prompt: Say: I am reading a short story now.
correctAnswer: Estoy leyendo un cuento corto ahora.

prompt: Say: Yesterday I studied for two hours.
Say: Tomorrow I will practice with my friend.
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Say: If I have time, I will review the lesson.
correctAnswer: Si tengo tiempo, repasaré la lección.
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Say: I have been studying Spanish for six months.
correctAnswer: He estado estudiando español durante seis meses.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: I would travel more if flights were cheaper.
correctAnswer: Viajaría más si los vuelos fueran más baratos.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: By the time we arrive, they will have finished dinner.
correctAnswer: Para cuando lleguemos, ellos habrán terminado de cenar.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.

prompt: Say: Had I known earlier, I would have changed the plan.
correctAnswer: Si lo hubiera sabido antes, habría cambiado el plan.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.

prompt: Say: Every morning I write three new words.
correctAnswer: Cada mañana escribo tres palabras nuevas.

prompt: Say: We were cooking when the guests arrived.
correctAnswer: Estábamos cocinando cuando llegaron los invitados.
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Say: I had already left when the message arrived.
correctAnswer: Ya me había ido cuando llegó el mensaje.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: If I had practiced more, I would be more confident now.
correctAnswer: Si hubiera practicado más, ahora tendría más confianza.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.
